mapper.sql: SELECT A.SEQ, A.RESUME_SEQ, A.PERSON_ID, A.EMPID, A.LOCAL_NAME, A.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(A.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) DEPTNAME, A.POST_GRADE_NO, A.POST_GRADE_NAME, A.OBJECT_TYPE, A.OBJECT_TYPE_NAME, TO_CHAR(A.DATE_STARTED, 'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_STARTED, A.ACTIVITY, GET_CODE_NAME(A.ACTIVITY, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ACTIVITY_NAME, A.ORDERNO FROM EVS_OBJECT A WHERE A.RESUME_SEQ = #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT OBJECT.SEQ, RESUME.EVS_YEAR, OBJECT.RESUME_SEQ, OBJECT.LOCAL_NAME, OBJECT.POST_GRADE_NAME, OBJECT.MAIN_BUSINESS, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(OBJECT.MAIN_BUSINESS, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) MAIN_BUSINESS_NAME, OBJECT.OBJECT_TYPE, OBJECT.OBJECT_TYPE_NAME, GET_DEPT_NAME(OBJECT.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) DEPTNAME, TO_CHAR(OBJECT.DATE_STARTED, 'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_STARTED, OBJECT.ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(RESUME.EVS_START_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'DD/MM/YYYY') EVS_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(RESUME.EVS_END_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'DD/MM/YYYY') EVS_END_DATE, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'LOCAL_NAME') LOCAL_NAME0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'LOCAL_NAME') LOCAL_NAME1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'LOCAL_NAME') LOCAL_NAME2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'SEQ') SEQ0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'SEQ') SEQ1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'SEQ') SEQ2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'EVS_POINT') EVS_POINT0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'EVS_POINT') EVS_POINT1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'EVS_POINT') EVS_POINT2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'EVS_GRADE') EVS_GRADE0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'EVS_GRADE') EVS_GRADE1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'EVS_GRADE') EVS_GRADE2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'AFFIRM_COMMENT') AFFIRM_COMMENT1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'AFFIRM_COMMENT') AFFIRM_COMMENT2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT') AFFIRM_C1_L0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT2') AFFIRM_C2_L0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT') AFFIRM_C1_L1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT2') AFFIRM_C2_L1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT') AFFIRM_C1_L2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'AFFIRM_CONTENT2') AFFIRM_C2_L2 FROM EVS_RESUME_INFO RESUME, EVS_OBJECT OBJECT WHERE RESUME.SEQ = OBJECT.RESUME_SEQ AND OBJECT.SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE EVS_ITEM_SST SET EVS_SCORE = #{evsScore, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

MERGE INTO EVS_AFFIRM A USING ( SELECT B1.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ, B1.AFFIRM_LEVEL, B1.CALC_POINT, (SELECT GET_GLOBAL_NAME(g.EVS_GRADE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) FROM EVS_GRADE g, EVS_OBJECT o WHERE o.SEQ = B1.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ AND o.RESUME_SEQ = g.RESUME_SEQ AND B1.CALC_POINT BETWEEN g.START_SCORE AND g.END_SCORE AND ROWNUM = 1) AS CALC_GRADE FROM ( SELECT #{evsObjectSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS EVS_OBJECT_SEQ, 0 AS AFFIRM_LEVEL, ROUND( NVL((SELECT SUM(NVL(TO_NUMBER(ist.EVS_SCORE), 0) * NVL(TO_NUMBER(ist.ITEM_SCORE), 0) / 100) FROM EVS_ITEM_SST ist WHERE ist.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ = #{evsObjectSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 0), 2) AS CALC_POINT FROM DUAL ) B1 ) B ON (A.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ = B.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ AND A.AFFIRM_LEVEL = B.AFFIRM_LEVEL) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.AFFIRM_CONTENT = #{affirmContent1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, A.AFFIRM_CONTENT2 = #{affirmContent2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, A.EVS_POINT = B.CALC_POINT, A.EVS_GRADE = B.CALC_GRADE, A.UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, A.UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, A.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (SEQ, EVS_OBJECT_SEQ, AFFIRM_LEVEL, AFFIRM_CONTENT, AFFIRM_CONTENT2, EVS_POINT, EVS_GRADE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE) VALUES (EVS_PARAM_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{evsObjectSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{affirmContent1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{affirmContent2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, B.CALC_POINT, B.CALC_GRADE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE)
